title: Automatic Stirring Mug,Rechargeable Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug,Suitable for Stirring Coffee, Milk, Protein Powder, Cocoa, Tea, Beverage and So On at Home, Office, Traveling (White)
description:
About this item
FREE YOUR HANDS: This mug is equipped with an automatic magnetic stirring device that automatically stirs your drink without the need to do it manually, freeing your hands.
RAPID COOLING: The magnetic stirring coffee cup adopts advanced cooling technology, which can quickly reduce the drink from 85℃ to 55℃, ensuring a better taste of the drink.
EASY TO CLEAN AND MAINTENANCE: The stirring device is removable, convenient for users to clean it separately. The automatic stirring coffee cup is made of food-grade 304 stainless steel material, easy to rinse with water to keep clean and sanitary.
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for stirring coffee, milk, cocoa, tea and other beverages at home, in the office or while traveling.
USB CHARGING: The mug comes with a rechargeable battery for easy USB charging.
